basic_details.short_information: Banaras Hindu University (BHU) Field Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website bhu.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the BHU Field Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation: 5 years for female/SC/ST/Physically Handicapped candidate and 3 years for OBC candidate.

content_sections.heading: BHU Field Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the BHU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download BHU Field Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: BHU Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
BHU Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
BHU Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 28 years Age relaxation: 5 years for female/SC/ST/Physically Handicapped candidate and 3 years for OBC candidate.

content_sections.heading: BHU Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
BHU Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
BHU Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for BHU Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: BHU Field Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for BHU Field Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Field Assistant position at Banaras Hindu University is scheduled for 11 August 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any specific reporting times.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Field Assistant position at BHU is Intermediate (12th pass).

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Field Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Field Assistant post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15,000 per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Field Assistant position is 28 years. Age relaxations are applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the BHU Field Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided data, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Field Assistant post at Banaras Hindu University.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this BHU recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application for this BHU recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at Banaras Hindu University (BHU) in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original documents and self-attested photocopies of ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant documents as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Field Assistant position at BHU is a contractual job, as indicated in the recruitment details.
